kw.msg: Fills the text 'Fulano da Silva' in the given field.

kw.doc: Checks the checkbox or selects radio button found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Element States
kw.doc: Get the active states from the element found by ``selector``.
